---
title: "About"
---

## About This Research

This website contains the research, analysis, and writing for my thesis on [your topic]. 

### Research Questions

1. Question one?
2. Question two?
3. Question three?

### Methodology

This research employs:

- **Statistical Analysis**: Using R for statistical modeling
- **Machine Learning**: Python for predictive analytics
- **Spatial Analysis**: GIS tools for geographic data
- **Data Visualization**: Interactive and static visualizations

### Timeline

- **Phase 1**: Literature review and data collection
- **Phase 2**: Exploratory data analysis
- **Phase 3**: Model development
- **Phase 4**: Writing and publication

## About Me

[Your bio here]

### Contact

- Email: your.email@university.edu
- GitHub: [yourusername](https://github.com/yourusername)
- LinkedIn: [Your Name](https://linkedin.com/in/yourprofile)
